title: Elevators
description: A simple elevator plugin with PlotSquared integration for your Minecraft server.
body:
Elevators offers an innovative way to leverage standard daylight sensors in Minecraft as a foundation for creating efficient elevators. Through intelligent integration with Plotsquared, this plugin allows the setup of a private mode for elevators specifically targeting community-oriented servers. This adaptability provides servers with the opportunity to enhance player mobility by presenting a new level of elevator usage without fundamentally implementing new features.

Elevators stands out for its user-friendly interface and customizable options. Server administrators can tailor elevators to their individual needs, making it a versatile solution for improving the player experience. The plugin seamlessly integrates into existing structures on the server, expanding them to provide maximum adaptability and performance.
